pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 67 (MainJson BaseUrl setting). This is the value from the main branch that should win the merge conflict resolution. Feature branch has conflicting value 'https://api.tailwindtraders.com/v1/stable' (line 99).
setup_task.sh line 68 (MainJson ApiVersion setting). Feature branch lacks this field.
setup_task.sh line 104 (FeatureJson RetryPolicy.MaxRetries setting). Main branch lacks RetryPolicy entirely.
setup_task.sh line 105 (FeatureJson RetryPolicy.RetryDelayMs setting). Main branch lacks RetryPolicy entirely.
setup_task.sh line 106 (FeatureJson RetryPolicy.EnableCircuitBreaker = $true). Main branch lacks RetryPolicy entirely.

privileged_info_summary: The resolve_merge_conflict task uses synthetic test data. The task creates a Git repository with a TailwindTraders-Api project containing an appsettings.json configuration file. The merge conflict arises because the main branch updates the BaseUrl to 'https://api.tailwindtraders.com/v2' with ApiVersion '2.0', while the feature branch adds RetryPolicy configuration (MaxRetries=3, RetryDelayMs=1000, EnableCircuitBreaker=true) with a conflicting BaseUrl of 'https://api.tailwindtraders.com/v1/stable'. The expected resolution preserves the main branch's v2 API endpoint and ApiVersion while adding all RetryPolicy fields from the feature branch.
